faq.title: We answer
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.a1: Yes. Qarte installs directly on your phone from your dashboard — no need to go through the App Store or Google Play. You get an icon just like a real app and run your salon in one tap, wherever you are.
faq.q2: Will my clients find it complicated?
faq.a2: They scan the QR code with their camera, that's it. No app to download, no account to create. To book, they pick their services, choose a slot on your page and confirm in 30 seconds.
faq.a4: Online booking is included in the All-in-one plan (€24/month). Two modes to choose from: free mode (the system calculates slots from your opening hours) or slot mode (you create availability manually). Your clients book from your page, you get an instant notification, they get an SMS confirmation and a reminder the day before. Optional automatic deposit. Not available on the Loyalty plan.
faq.q5: How do referrals and the new client offer work?
faq.a5: Your clients share a link with friends. The new client gets a voucher, the referrer too. The new client offer shows on your page to convert new visitors. Fully automatic.
faq.a6: Yes. You choose the gift (e.g. -20%, free treatment) and Qarte sends it automatically on each client's birthday. Zero effort on your part.
faq.q9: Does it work for freelancers and home services?
faq.a9: Yes. Show the QR code on your phone, your client scans it, their visit is recorded. Your salon page replaces the website you never had time to build.
faq.q10: I'm already on Planity or Booksy — is it compatible?
faq.a10: Yes. With the Loyalty plan (€19/month), you keep your booking tool and add Qarte loyalty, storefront, referrals and Google reviews. With All-in-one (€24/month), you replace your tool and get integrated calendar + online booking.
faq.q11: How do deposits work for bookings?
faq.a11: Available with the All-in-one plan. You add your own payment link (Revolut, PayPal, Stripe...) in your calendar settings. When a client books online, they're asked to pay a deposit through your link. No Qarte commission — you receive payment directly to your account.
faq.a12: All-in-one plan: 100 SMS/month included (booking reminders, confirmations, marketing). Loyalty plan: birthday and referral SMS sent automatically with no quota — marketing campaigns require All-in-one. No usage billing: if you exceed, you buy a pack (from €5.70 for 50 SMS).
faq.q13: Can I use only the loyalty program?
faq.a13: Yes — that's the Loyalty plan at €19/month. You use Qarte for loyalty (stamps or cashback), SEO storefront, Google reviews and referrals, without scheduling or online booking. Perfect if you already have Planity, Booksy or a calendar that works for you.

compare.heroTitle: You pay {competitor} for booking. What about loyalty?
compare.heroSubtitle: Qarte combines booking, loyalty and storefront in one tool — no commission, for {price}/mo.
compare.reason1Desc: A client books online → she automatically gets her loyalty card. One tool instead of 3.
compare.reason2Desc: €24/mo, everything included. {competitor} charges a commission per booking — not Qarte.
compare.reason3Desc: Your page is indexed in your city. Visible salons get 3x more inquiries.
compare.reason4Desc: Clients scan the QR with their camera. No app to download, no account to create.
compare.t1Quote: I use Qarte to manage my clients' loyalty cards and it's great. I also created a storefront for my hair salon.
compare.t2Quote: I'm very happy with Qarte for managing my institute's appointments. Very practical and easy to use.
compare.t3Quote: Digital loyalty card at its best, clients don't lose their cards anymore and maximum fluidity.
compare.pricingDesc: No commission, no hidden fees. 2 plans based on your needs.
compare.faqQ1: Can I keep {competitor} and use Qarte at the same time?
compare.faqA1: Yes. Keep {competitor} for what you want and add Qarte for loyalty, storefront, referrals and Google reviews. Or switch entirely to Qarte — you choose.
compare.faqQ2: Do I lose my data if I cancel?
compare.faqA2: No. Your data is kept for 30 days. If you resubscribe, everything comes back as-is.
compare.faqQ3: How long to set everything up?
compare.faqA3: 2 minutes for the loyalty program, 5 minutes for the full storefront. We guide you step by step.
compare.faqA4: None. Cancel in 1 click, no justification, no hidden fees.
compare.finalCtaTitle: Your clients deserve more than just a booking
compare.finalCtaDesc: Booking + loyalty + storefront — 7 days free, no credit card.
compare.planity_desc: Planity is an online booking platform for beauty salons. It focuses on appointment scheduling.
compare.booksy_desc: Booksy is a booking app for beauty and wellness professionals.
compare.metaTitlePlanity: Qarte vs Planity — 2026 Comparison | Commission-Free Alternative
compare.metaDescPlanity: Qarte vs Planity: loyalty, SEO storefront, referrals, Google reviews and 0% commission. See why 400+ pros chose Qarte.

compare.metaDescBookinbeautiful: Qarte vs Book in Beautiful: loyalty, SEO storefront, referrals, Google reviews and 0% commission. See why 400+ pros chose Qarte.
compare.planity_tldr: {competitor} is a solid online booking solution, but it stops at appointment scheduling. Qarte goes further by combining booking, loyalty and storefront in one tool — with no commission, for €24/month.
compare.booksy_tldr: {competitor} offers online booking with a client app. Qarte offers the same without an app to download, plus loyalty, SEO storefront and referrals — all commission-free.
compare.bookinbeautiful_tldr: {competitor} is a booking platform for salons. Qarte includes booking plus loyalty, SEO storefront, Google reviews and referrals — no commission, for €24/month.
compare.chooseQarteDesc: You want an all-in-one tool (booking + loyalty + storefront) with no commission and no app for your clients to download.
compare.planity_chooseThem: You only need an online calendar with strong visibility on their marketplace and commission isn't a concern.
compare.booksy_chooseThem: You want a dedicated client app and commission on bookings isn't a concern for you.
compare.bookinbeautiful_chooseThem: You only need a basic online booking system and commission isn't a concern.

compare.altHeroSubtitle: Tired of {competitor}'s commissions? Qarte combines booking, loyalty and storefront in one tool — no commission, €24/month all-in.

compare.altMigrationDesc: Zero hassle. We help you keep your client base and existing habits.
compare.altMigrationStep1Desc: Email + password, shop type, phone. Configure your loyalty program in 3 clicks.
compare.altMigrationStep2Desc: Add clients manually, or let Qarte build up your base as they scan. No forced export from {competitor}.
compare.altMigrationStep3Desc: Add services, hours, photos — your storefront is live and indexed on Google. You can keep {competitor} during transition — no exclusivity.

ambassador.metaTitle: Qarte Ambassador Program — Earn €4.80/month per referred salon
ambassador.metaDesc: Refer beauty salons to Qarte and earn 20% recurring commission every month. No commitment, no limits, no investment.
ambassador.heroSubtitle: Know a hairdresser, beautician, or barber? Share your link. If they subscribe to Qarte, you earn 20% of their subscription — every month, as long as they stay.
ambassador.commissionSub: On every subscription, every month, no limit
ambassador.stepsDesc: You can start earning in less than 5 minutes.
ambassador.step1Desc: Fill out the form below in 2 minutes. We review your application within 24-48h.
ambassador.step2Desc: Send your link to beauty professionals you know. They can try Qarte free for 7 days.
ambassador.step3Desc: Every pro who subscribes via your link earns you €4.80/month. 10 salons = €48/month. 50 salons = €240/month.
ambassador.perk1Desc: €4.80 per salon, every month, as long as they stay subscribed. No cap, no time limit.
ambassador.perk2Desc: Refer salons in all 3 countries. One link, no geographic restrictions.
ambassador.perk3Desc: Track your referrals, conversions and earnings from your dedicated space.
ambassador.perk4Desc: Pros try Qarte without a credit card. You don't need to convince — just share.
ambassador.perk5Desc: Commissions are calculated monthly and paid directly to your bank account.
ambassador.perk6Title: No need to be a client
ambassador.perk6Desc: You don't use Qarte yourself? No problem. You just need to know beauty professionals.
ambassador.profilesDesc: You don't need to be in the beauty industry. You just need to know people who are.
ambassador.profile1Desc: You have a community of hairdressers, beauticians or barbers? Monetize your recommendation with a tool they'll love.
ambassador.profile2Desc: You train beauty professionals? Recommend the tool that will support them in their business and earn a commission on every signup.
ambassador.profile3Desc: Your sister is a hairdresser, your friend is a barber? A simple message with your link can earn you €4.80/month.
ambassador.profile4Desc: You have a network of business owners? Add Qarte to your portfolio. 20% recurring commission on every salon.
ambassador.simulatorDesc: Move the slider to see how much you could earn each month.
ambassador.faqQ1: How much do I earn per salon exactly?
ambassador.faqA1: You earn 20% of the monthly subscription. At €24/month, that's €4.80 per salon every month. It's recurring: as long as the salon stays subscribed, you earn. With 10 salons, that's €48/month. With 50, €240/month.
ambassador.faqQ2: When and how do I get paid?
ambassador.faqA2: Commissions are calculated at the end of each month and paid via bank transfer within 15 days. You receive a detailed breakdown by email.
ambassador.faqA3: Nothing at all. The program is 100% free, no commitment, no investment. You can stop anytime without justification.
ambassador.faqQ4: Do the pros I refer have to pay right away?
ambassador.faqA4: No. They get a 7-day free trial without a credit card. You only earn your commission if they subscribe after the trial.
ambassador.faqQ5: What happens if a salon cancels?
ambassador.faqA5: Your commission stops for that salon only. Your other referrals continue as normal. You can always refer new salons.
ambassador.faqQ6: Do I need to sell or convince anyone?
ambassador.faqA6: No. Qarte has a free trial and pros can test it themselves. You just share your link. The product does the rest.
ambassador.faqQ7: How many salons can I refer?
ambassador.faqA7: No limit. 5, 50 or 500 salons — your commission scales proportionally, with no cap.
